review_title: Once its setup, it just works and provides extremely useful insights
description: Our overall experience with Two Minute Reports has been great, Two Minute Reports has enabled us to grow our marketing efforts and ensure we can quickly keep an eye on key metrics within Google Data Studio. I don't think I could ask for more from it. It does exactly what it promises, nothing more, nothing less.
author: Matt L.
pros: Two Minute Reports has enabled us to use more marketing channels and keep an eye on performance of these without spending too much extra time on them. We can now glance and review performance of marketing channels Google Data Studio did not support. If you want to save time and grow your marketing Two Minute Reports is an indispensable tool.
cons: We had some issues setting up Two Minute Reports with Microsoft Ads, I do believe though when we set this up (and possibly still) that this was labelled as Beta. It was a little painful getting this setup but the support team assisted in helping us getting this setup. It did take maybe 5 hours out of my day working on this. As I mentioned previously though once it was setup, it has worked flawlessly ever since.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's been fantastic so far and looking forward to using the tool long-term into the forseeable future.
author: Michael V.
pros: I love having data coming in from all of my advertising sources into one place, and Two Minute Tool allows me to do that. The team have been fantastic and new features are added regularly which is great. Pricing is also very competitive.
cons: Nothing so far. Everything has worked well and any issues have been fixed very quickly by the team.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall a very useful concept with excellent functional components but the delivery is lacking at this stage. The 2 main shortcomings (ease of use and speed) are both aspects that can be fixed and are on the roadmap apparently. Once these issues are fixed, they will have a very solid product uniquely positioned at the current price point.
author: Neels V.
pros: I like the range of data connectors available and the depth of detail you get from the data connectors that I currently use, which are mainly Facebook Ads. Many of their competitors in the same price range provide a very limited range of data points which makes them not relevant for most users. Two Minute Reports provide pretty much all the data points you can think of in the Facebook Ads interface.
cons: The biggest disappointments for me are the confusing, illogical user interface and slow speed. One would think that connecting a data connector should be a straightforward activity and the difficult part comes after connecting (analysing the data). Not so here. I had to spend hours fiddling and trying different options without success. Then only after a few support desk interchanges did I manage to connect for the first time. Only to have to repeat the process after a few weeks for reasons unknown to me. Then the update speed. Once you managed to finally connect, be prepared to spend more time than usual preparing your reports. Each change calls back to the data sources which are incredibly slow to refresh.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Exactly What I Needed and Nothing Else (Which Is Exactly What I Wanted)
author: Patrick B.
pros: Affordable and flexible. Everything I need... including Bing Ads!
cons: I was confused at the start on the Looker Studio vs Google Sheets integrations. My end goal is Looker Studio, but the need to use Sheets for ingestion first to allow the data to be calculated against fixed numbers (like budget pacing) wasn't totally clear.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Must For Digital Agencies and Online Businesses
description: If you’re selling or marketing online, Two Minute Reports is a must have. We’ve been using Two Minute Reports for Google Sheets daily for over two years for ourselves and for our agency clients, and we frequently recommend Two Minute Reports to others. We’ve worked with multiple connectors and have found that Two Minute Reports rivals all of them out of the box; but what sets Two Minute Reports apart is their support team. While other connectors are impersonal and slow to manage bugs, [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and his team are incredibly responsive with solutions and product improvements. We highly recommend Two Minute Reports and would give them 10 stars if we could!
author: Shanda P.
pros: Two Minute Reports for Google Sheets & Google Data Studio are both as easy to use; but what I really love is the support team. I've worked with several major connectors in the market, and none have had a support team half as responsive as the team at Two Minute Reports has been.
cons: The only con I have with Two Minute Reports is that it's missing a connection with Klaviyo. I know it's on the roadmap -- just wish it could be made available sooner than later. :)

review_title: Good Value API Pull Request Tool
description: Fast, good value for money, efficient, constantly adding new data connectors.
author: Rob P.
pros: The Google sheets sidebar is very intuitive and easy to setup.
cons: Initially, the system automatically created multiple accounts (although only one was needed). This was easily resolved by customer service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best super cheap alternative to Supermetrics
author: Gabriele F.
pros: It is a tool that is constantly changing but at the moment does everything supermetrics does at a fraction of its price. I'm suggesting this tool to all my network and they are loving it. The Customer care is incredible, if you have any problem or any need, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is gonna reply to you asap and will solve the your problem in no time
cons: It's a always evolving tool, there are not all the feature you need, but they are getting there really quickly

review_title: Great software but still missing some integrations
author: Diego D.
pros: The software is great, very easy to use and does the same as other softwares which charge you x20 its cost. The support is amazing. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has even added developments as soon as I have requested them and it is "live product" which is constantly being improved. Love its simplicity. I can pull data from Google Ads, Facebook Ads and many other platforms and schedule automatic refreshes on a daily basis. Having all this data in a spreadsheet you can then create dashboards in Google Data Studio which clients love as this allows them to filter by date range. It is an amazing software that I strongly recommend.
cons: Cons from this software is that there's some stuff still at an early stage. Depending on when you read this might not be up to date but the main thing this tool lacks is integration with other platforms like Twitter Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Data Studio connector... (I'm aware all of them are being developed or in the roadmap). Also, I've found a couple of minor bugs while using the tool but the [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] quickly fixed them on the same day. But overall, nothing really negative than typical things a new software which is not fully developed could have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm able to track my digital marketing campaigns throughly and at a reasonable price.
author: Jacob N.
pros: I like the price and the fact that there are pre-made templates to use. I like that it integrates with Google ata Studio.
cons: I find that it's a little harder to build your own stat charts. I love using the pre-made templates but the templates don't always have the statistical elements I need. I'd love it if more templates were made.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its ease of use, coupled with its ability to integrate with popular platforms like Google Analytics and Facebook Ads, makes it an attractive option for businesses and agencies that need a reliable reporting solution without a steep learning curve.
author: Jakub M.
pros: Its ease of use makes creating and automating reports straightforward, even for users who are not very tech-savvy.
cons: While it allows for basic customizations, more advanced users may find the reporting options somewhat limited compared to more sophisticated reporting tools, particularly when dealing with highly complex datasets.

review_title: Reimpulsando los informes en Google Sheet
description: La experiencia ha sido muy opositiva. La conexión con las APIs son rápidas y eficaces.
author: José Antonio D.
pros: Me gusta la automatización y la conexión con Facebook Ads. Me encanta que sea una alternativa tan buena a Supermetrics
cons: Me encantaría que tuvieran pronto, o al menos durante 2021, la conexión con DataStudio. Entonces será la herramienta definitiva de reporting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Brandon T.
pros: TMR let's me fully use Google Data Studio for my reporting and dashboards. One of the best parts is the team behind it - super responsive and eager to help you be successful with the product.
cons: The data connectors can be slow - some reports load very very slowly, but I hear they are working on it.

author: orit S.
pros: This feature is literally awesome!! Save lots to s of time and tons of money 💸 ! And Great service doe . I definitely recommend it
cons: There is no such thing I am very pleased

author: Dennard C.
pros: It does the job of what you need. I love how I'm able to pull in data into a google sheet and make decisions on that data. Makes my life easier to manage my accounts to make the correct decisions.
cons: I wish I was able to pull in data into one sheet. When trying to pull in more than one thing I have to use more than one sheet which sucks.

description: Great experience. I believe when the few features will be listed, the product would be much better.
author: Tal D.
pros: Great support. Looks like the product is during many features development which I appreciate a lot.
cons: Still, some of the basic features were missing. Reported to the support, and they were saying it's under development. We can grow together with the product :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good, I will continue to use. Since i have been using two minute reports further updates have also been made.
author: Ryan H.
pros: Easy to set up and great customer communication!
cons: Data loading errors. At times the reports do not load all tables.

review_title: Amazingly Useful Data Analyses and Reporting
description: Overall, this is a highly potent software that takes your reporting and analytics to the next level. It is easy to integrate and use this software so that you can start using it quickly. Reports can be automated and customized to your needs with real time updating. We have automated this so the reports are emailed out to the people who use them, and encourage them to stay up to date on things vital to running our business. The support is helpful and thorough so you are never left without answers or guidance. Highly recommend trying Two Minute Reports to change the way you use data , it is awesome.
author: Jonathan J.
pros: The is customizable and easy to use software creates useful and easy to use reports at the click of a button. This has allowed us to start analyzing our data in easy to read and understand ways, rather than numbers and words on a page. It has integrated easily into our existing systems. The support is awesome so if you get stuck just get in contact and get walked through any questions or concerns. They are also activately improving the software so it becomes more and more intuitive and useful the longer you use it.
cons: Can be a little bit of a learning curve, but certianly not too difficult once you get it. From there the results are potent and easy to use. With the support it is easy to get answers.

review_title: My weekly report is done in 1 minute rather than 1 hour.
author: Sarah C.
pros: It does one thing really really well. It pulls data and puts it into a spreadsheet, it’s pretty easy to tweak so the data comes in how you want it to, and where. Very simplistic but saves me hours each month.
cons: It took me a bit of trial and error to set up the sheet with the data I wanted without new data overwriting old data. But once set up it works really well.

description: Functional and easy to use, good price comparing competitors
author: Anderson L.
pros: Functional and easy to use, great quality of data.
cons: In case of use filters i faced with non aggregate values

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: An excellent tool and helps a lot in our day to day
cons: Support takes a while to respond a email

review_title: Lightweight, Simple & Straightforward Data Analytics Tool for Sheets
description: Inexpensive alternative for getting channel-level data into Google Sheets. I also appreciate the transparency of the developer and their quick turnaround on new requests. Looking forward to Bing Ads being added soon.
author: Brian C.
pros: Easy setup for pulling Google & FB ads data into Google Sheets for querying in Data Studio and other reporting solutions.
cons: The process from payment to setup and verification was a little unorganized, but their customer support team resolved the issue quickly.

review_title: Great tool for skilled marketers who want to track data
description: Great experience, will use it more and more in future
author: Marco B.
pros: Customer support ability to pull data from many sources
cons: Some features still have to be released but I know they are working hard on this

author: John C.
pros: This is an amazing client reporting tool for web agencies and freelancers. From Google Sheets, you connect to a range of analytics (for example Google Analytics and Google Search Console) and decide how to display the graphs or charts from the raw data. Similar to Monster Insights, but you need to decide what to show on the report. The impressive thing is that I can create a custom report from my Wordpress MySQL database! We have a membership client and with Two Minute Reports I can show renewals and new membership purchases for the month. Lay it out nicely and schedule an email to the exec committee to track performance. This is alongside the analytics and SEO data.
cons: More templates would help - but they are on the road map. There is a learning curve, so some more youtube videos would be good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Fanny M.
pros: They have a good choice of connectors. For ecommerces, they do most social media, GA (better than Google's), Shopify, Amazon, Klaviyo. In short, everything we need. They have a public roadmap and it's easy to ask for features (or through their roadmap board or by emailing them). Even if your request might be complicated, they always reply. Their price is affordable too.
cons: It has fewer connectors than some other tools, which are 10x more expensive. So it's up to you to choose what you really need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Supermetrics alternative - inexpensive & responsive support
author: William B.
pros: Great capabilities - a really good number of connectors. Customer support has been really responsive in solving any issues.
cons: There are a couple of connectors that I'd love to see added, but they are ever expanding.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
